callout_composite_metric_extremum_label: Across the callout cards, which callout has the {rank_direction} total from {first_field_label} plus {second_field_label}?
For each callout, add {first_field_label} and {second_field_label}. Which callout title has the {rank_direction} total?
Using the visible numbers for {first_field_label} and {second_field_label}, identify the callout with the {rank_direction} combined value.
When {first_field_label} plus {second_field_label} is compared across cards, which callout title is {rank_direction}?
Order the callouts by {first_field_label} plus {second_field_label}, {rank_order_phrase}. Which callout title is first?
callout_metric_extremum_label: Across the callout cards, which callout has the {rank_direction} visible value for field {field_label}?
For field {field_label}, what callout title contains the {rank_direction} value?
Scan the callout cards that show {field_label}. Which callout is {rank_direction}?
Using all visible {field_label} values, identify the callout title with the {rank_direction} value.
When the {field_label} values are ordered {rank_order_phrase}, which callout title is first?
callout_condition_count: Count the callouts whose {field_label} value is {condition_phrase} {threshold_value}.
Across the callout cards, what is the number with {field_label} {condition_phrase} {threshold_value}?
Using field {field_label}, count the callout values that are {condition_phrase} {threshold_value}.
What count of callout cards satisfies {field_label} {condition_phrase} {threshold_value}?

global.json_output_contract: Return a JSON object with "annotation" and "answer".
global.json_output_contract_answer_only: Return a JSON object with "answer" only.

query:callout_composite_metric_extremum_.object_description: titled callout cards with field labels, visible values, badges, and connector lines
query:callout_composite_metric_extremum_.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible callout title requested by the question
query:callout_composite_metric_extremum_.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object mapping "winning_callout_card" and each compared "candidate_N_first_field_row" and "candidate_N_second_field_row" to [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel bounding boxes

query:callout_metric_extremum_label.object_description: titled callout cards with field labels, visible values, badges, and connector lines
query:callout_metric_extremum_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible callout title requested by the question
query:callout_metric_extremum_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object mapping "winning_callout_card" and each compared "candidate_N_field_row" to [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel bounding boxes

query:callout_condition_count.object_description: titled callout cards with field labels, visible values, badges, and connector lines
query:callout_condition_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested integer count
query:callout_condition_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel bounding boxes for the matching field rows
